restaurants.name_th: ครัวล้านนา วิวสุเทพ
restaurants.description: Cozy northern Thai restaurant near the mountain route, known for classic Lanna dishes and relaxed family seating.
metadata: Recommended time: Lunch and early dinner
Notes: Signature northern set menu and mountain-view seating

restaurants.name_th: ม่อนแจ่ม ปิ้งย่างกลางป่า
restaurants.description: Open-air grill spot with forest views, serving smoky grilled meats and simple sharing platters.
metadata: Notes: Best for group grilling and scenic photos

restaurants.name_th: อินทนนท์ เทรล คาเฟ่
restaurants.description: Small cafe for hikers offering coffee, light breakfast, and quick bites before or after trail walks.
metadata: Notes: Popular stop before hiking routes

restaurants.name_th: ร้านอาหารริมน้ำตกแม่กลาง
restaurants.description: Casual local eatery near waterfall routes with rice dishes, soups, and easy lunch menus for groups.
metadata: Notes: Family-friendly tables near nature trails

restaurants.name_th: นิมมาน โซเชียล บิสโทร
restaurants.description: Modern bistro in the Nimman area with trendy plates, creative drinks, and a social evening vibe.
metadata: Notes: Stylish spot for social dining and photos

restaurants.name_th: โรสต์ แอนด์ บลูม นิมมาน
restaurants.description: Brunch-focused cafe with specialty coffee, toast sets, and desserts popular with shoppers and students.
metadata: Notes: Coffee and dessert pairings are the highlights

restaurants.name_th: สตรีทฟู้ดวัวลาย
restaurants.description: Night market style stall cluster serving affordable grilled snacks and classic Chiang Mai street dishes.
restaurants.zone: Across from Old City Gate (Pratu Mueang)
metadata: Notes: Great for low-cost street food hopping

restaurants.name_th: ขันโตกประตูเงิน
restaurants.description: Traditional northern Thai dinner house with local set menus and warm old-city atmosphere.
restaurants.zone: Across from Old City Gate (Pratu Mueang)
metadata: Notes: Traditional Lanna-style menu and decor

restaurants.name_th: เขานาคเกิด พาโนรามา คาเฟ่
restaurants.description: Hilltop cafe with wide scenic views, offering coffee, cakes, and light meals for sightseeing breaks.
metadata: Notes: Panoramic viewpoints available at terrace seats

restaurants.name_th: ระเบียงสายสุขภาพ พระใหญ่ภูเก็ต
restaurants.description: Vegetarian-friendly terrace restaurant serving healthy bowls and Thai favorites in a peaceful setting.
metadata: Notes: Healthy menu with vegetarian-friendly options

restaurants.name_th: ระเบียงซีฟู้ด หาดป่าตอง
restaurants.description: Busy beachfront seafood spot with fresh catches, grilled platters, and lively evening crowds.
metadata: Notes: Fresh seafood and lively beachfront atmosphere

restaurants.name_th: ซันเซ็ต ป่าตอง กริลล์
restaurants.description: Family-friendly grill restaurant near the beach, popular for sunset meals and sharing menus.
metadata: Notes: Good for family sharing platters

restaurants.name_th: ครัวเมืองเก่าภูเก็ต
restaurants.description: Local old-town kitchen known for affordable noodle and rice dishes with authentic Phuket flavor.
metadata: Notes: Local Phuket recipes at friendly prices

restaurants.name_th: โซนอาหาร หลาดปล่อยของ
restaurants.description: Market-side food corner combining quick local bites with a casual social shopping atmosphere.
metadata: Notes: Easy stop during market exploration

restaurants.name_th: ก๋วยเตี๋ยวราคาประหยัด ดอยสุเทพ
restaurants.description: Budget noodle shop for fast and filling meals before heading to mountain attractions.
metadata: Notes: Budget noodle bowls under 100 THB

restaurants.name_th: ร้านข้าวแกง อินทนนท์เทรล
restaurants.description: Simple rice bowl place with affordable portions, ideal for quick lunch during park visits.
metadata: Notes: Fast service for travelers on tight schedules

restaurants.name_th: ร้านข้าวแกงนักศึกษา นิมมาน
restaurants.description: Student-friendly canteen style restaurant with budget menus and fast service in the Nimman zone.
metadata: Notes: Student-priced meals with quick turnover

restaurants.name_th: สตรีทฟู้ดโต้รุ่ง ประตูเมือง
restaurants.description: Evening street food lineup featuring grilled skewers, stir-fry boxes, and local snack favorites.
restaurants.zone: Across from Old City Gate (Pratu Mueang)
metadata: Notes: Ideal for evening budget food crawl

restaurants.name_th: มุมของทานเล่น หาดป่าตอง
restaurants.description: Beachside snack stand with quick fried bites, fruit shakes, and wallet-friendly meal options.
metadata: Notes: Quick beach snacks at fixed low prices

restaurants.name_th: ศูนย์อาหารราคาประหยัด เมืองภูเก็ต
restaurants.description: Affordable food court with multiple local stalls offering budget lunch sets and drinks.
metadata: Notes: Multiple stalls, ideal for group preferences

restaurants.name_th: โจ๊กยามเช้า ดอยสุเทพ
restaurants.description: Early morning congee and soft-boiled egg shop perfect for a light breakfast before temple trips.
metadata: Notes: Morning-only menu with very budget pricing

restaurants.name_th: ข้าวกล่องด่วน นิมมาน
restaurants.description: Grab-and-go lunch box counter serving quick rice menus for office workers and travelers.
metadata: Notes: Grab-and-go format for quick city itineraries

restaurants.name_th: ปิ้งย่างเสียบไม้ ถนนวัวลาย
restaurants.description: Affordable evening grill stall with smoky skewers and simple dinner combos near the walking street.
restaurants.zone: Across from Old City Gate (Pratu Mueang)
metadata: Notes: Popular after sunset for grilled skewers

restaurants.name_th: มื้อเช้ารับอรุณ เขานาคเกิด
restaurants.description: Morning cafe serving toast sets and coffee with sunrise viewpoints around Nakkerd Hill.
metadata: Notes: Sunrise-friendly seating and light menu

restaurants.name_th: ร้านข้าวแกงมื้อเที่ยง เมืองภูเก็ต
restaurants.description: Everyday lunch shop with rotating Thai dishes, quick service, and consistent low prices.

restaurants.name_th: รถเข็นสตรีทฟู้ดริมหาด ป่าตอง
restaurants.description: Street cart for simple beachside dinners, popular for sunset hours and budget-friendly portions.
metadata: Notes: Best value options after beach activities
